records.description: Docker COPY failed, file not in build context — enable BuildKit and clear cache

stderr_regex: COPY failed.*file not found in build context|failed to compute cache key.*not found

shortest_verification.command: bash -c 'echo "COPY failed: file not found in build context or excluded by .dockerignore: stat src/package.json: file does not exist" >&2; exit 1'
shortest_verification.expected_stderr_match: COPY failed.*file not found|cache key.*not found

fix_path.description: Docker COPY failed, file not in build context — enable BuildKit and clear cache

legacy_v3.stderr_pattern: COPY failed.*file not found in build context|failed to compute cache key.*not found
legacy_v3.description: Docker COPY failed, file not in build context — enable BuildKit and clear cache

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "COPY failed: file not found in build context or excluded by .dockerignore: stat src/package.json: file does not exist" >&2; exit 1'
reproduction.expected_stderr_match: COPY failed.*file not found|cache key.*not found

records.description: Docker RUN command failed during build — enable BuildKit with plain progress for diagnostics

stderr_regex: executor failed running.*exit code: [1-9]|RUN.*returned a non-zero code

shortest_verification.command: bash -c 'echo "executor failed running [/bin/sh -c npm ci --production]: exit code: 1" >&2; exit 1'

fix_path.description: Docker RUN command failed during build — enable BuildKit with plain progress for diagnostics

legacy_v3.stderr_pattern: executor failed running.*exit code: [1-9]|RUN.*returned a non-zero code
legacy_v3.description: Docker RUN command failed during build — enable BuildKit with plain progress for diagnostics

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "executor failed running [/bin/sh -c npm ci --production]: exit code: 1" >&2; exit 1'

records.description: Docker build context has unreadable files — enable BuildKit which handles context filtering better

stderr_regex: error checking context.*no permission to read|error from sender.*no permission

shortest_verification.command: bash -c 'echo "error checking context: no permission to read from node_modules/bcrypt/build/Release/bcrypt_lib.node" >&2; exit 1'

fix_path.description: Docker build context has unreadable files — enable BuildKit which handles context filtering better

legacy_v3.stderr_pattern: error checking context.*no permission to read|error from sender.*no permission
legacy_v3.description: Docker build context has unreadable files — enable BuildKit which handles context filtering better

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "error checking context: no permission to read from node_modules/bcrypt/build/Release/bcrypt_lib.node" >&2; exit 1'
